title: Introduction to GitHub Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on GitHub basics.

questions.question: What is the primary role of GitHub?
options: To host and facilitate collaboration on Git repositories

questions.question: Regarding GitHub, where is your code hosted?
options: In the cloud on GitHub's servers

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of using GitHub for your project development?
options: It provides powerful tools for collaborating on code projects among team members
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only used for SQL code
